response.justification: Mohammed has strong, diverse full-stack experience spanning 10+ years with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, along with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest — all core to the role. His open-source contributions, architecture work, and cross-language adaptability (including Kotlin/Java via DLang and C++) demonstrate exceptional engineering maturity and alignment with the job’s technical and collaborative demands.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS CDK matching primary stack perfectly
Proven AI-agent infrastructure experience and contributions to agentic workflows, a required skill
Strong open-source portfolio and testing/DevOps expertise (Docker, GitLab CI, Vitest-like tools)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent tools (Node.js, testing frameworks) are present
German language skill is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise teams
Some roles (e.g., DLang, C++) are niche and may suggest over-diversification, though not a red flag
